Inputs / setup: Normalized schedule manifest from Yang table.
Measurement: Per-bed sequence, duration labels, slot/group IDs, pressure classes.
Clean pass criteria: Each bed executes the intended ten-step Yang sequence; merged/source durations are explicitly normalized.

Inputs / setup: Manifest plus pairing rules for EQI, EQII, PP/PU, AD&PP/BF.
Measurement: Partner count, operation complement, donor/receiver roles.
Clean pass criteria: Every direct-transfer role has exactly one compatible companion or fails with bed/slot detail.

Inputs / setup: Yang wrapper build path with internal transfer operations.
Measurement: Created state objects and unit inventory list.
Clean pass criteria: No dynamic internal tank/header state is created for EQI/EQII/PP/PU/AD&PP/BF transfers.

Inputs / setup: One donor in EQI-BD and one receiver in EQI-PR with known initial pressures.
Measurement: Signed transfer, terminal pressures, component balance.
Clean pass criteria: Existing paired-bed machinery is invoked once; donor/receiver direction and stage label are correct.

Inputs / setup: One donor in EQII-BD and one receiver in EQII-PR.
Measurement: Signed transfer, terminal pressures, stage-specific ledger row.
Clean pass criteria: EQII is distinct from EQI in metadata and ledger; conservation closes.

Inputs / setup: Provide-purge donor and purge receiver with endpoint sentinels.
Measurement: Boundary endpoint, flow direction, waste outlet.
Clean pass criteria: Donor product-end gas purges receiver countercurrently; receiver waste leaves correct end.

Inputs / setup: AD&PP donor, BF receiver, known product split/composition.
Measurement: Internal BF moles, external product moles, composition basis.
Clean pass criteria: BF internal stream and external product are separated and component-balanced.

Inputs / setup: state_A/state_B/state_C/state_D with distinguishable sentinel values.
Measurement: State names, local injection order, metadata.
Clean pass criteria: All four persistent states are addressable by name and mapped into temporary calls deterministically.

Inputs / setup: Slot with one paired call and two non-participating states.
Measurement: State diffs before/after per bed.
Clean pass criteria: Only the two participating states are replaced; non-participants remain unchanged.

Inputs / setup: Temporary call using non-adjacent global beds such as A/C or B/D.
Measurement: Returned local states vs global state labels.
Clean pass criteria: Local bed 1/2 outputs write back to the correct global bed labels.

Inputs / setup: Selected bed pair and direct-transfer operation metadata.
Measurement: Native case fields, boundary settings, initial states.
Clean pass criteria: toPSAil sees a standard paired-bed problem; four-bed identity remains wrapper metadata.

Inputs / setup: AD, BD, or other external/single operation from one persistent bed.
Measurement: Native case fields, terminal state extraction, ledger category.
Clean pass criteria: Single-bed operations execute without requiring fake companion tanks or global state.

Inputs / setup: Closed direct pair with no external feed/product/waste.
Measurement: Component inventory before/after and transfer ledger.
Clean pass criteria: Pair inventory change equals transfer accounting within tolerance.

Inputs / setup: One Yang operation group with external and internal streams.
Measurement: Feed, external product, waste, internal transfer, bed inventory delta.
Clean pass criteria: External balance closes; internal transfers cancel in the external product basis.

Inputs / setup: Several cycles of a four-bed wrapper pilot.
Measurement: Per-bed c/q/T/Tw residuals and aggregate residual.
Clean pass criteria: Stop condition uses all persistent beds and reports controlling state family.

Inputs / setup: One or more complete Yang wrapper cycles.
Measurement: Native metrics vs reconstructed external-basis metrics.
Clean pass criteria: Definitions are reported; internal recycle is excluded from product and recovery numerator.

Inputs / setup: Yang activated carbon/zeolite layer parameters.
Measurement: Axial adsorbent/material assignment support.
Clean pass criteria: Layered support is confirmed or the run is labeled as a homogeneous surrogate.

Inputs / setup: Direct-coupling pilot at multiple discretizations/tolerances.
Measurement: Runtime, pressure endpoints, purity/recovery, residuals.
Clean pass criteria: Default settings chosen from convergence/runtime evidence, not convenience.

Inputs / setup: EQI/EQII/PP/BF pressure-driven or flow-driven toy cases.
Measurement: Flow signs, reversal count, conservation residuals.
Clean pass criteria: Reversals are logged and physically interpretable; balances remain within tolerance.

Inputs / setup: Known existing toPSAil examples.
Measurement: Key outputs and pass/fail tolerances.
Clean pass criteria: Wrapper changes do not regress existing two-bed behavior.

Inputs / setup: Four-bed smoke run with output enabled.
Measurement: Manifest version, pair-map version, no-tank flag, metric basis, event policy.
Clean pass criteria: Every output artifact states the simplified wrapper assumptions.

Inputs / setup: Static tests, inert cases, direct-pair cases, duplicated two-bed cases, Yang skeleton.
Measurement: First failing stage and residuals.
Clean pass criteria: No later stage is attempted until the previous gate passes with recorded evidence.
